THEVALKYRIE-THE_VALKYRIE.aromaPrinciple: It can't go on like this! I must save them from this horrid life!
THEVALKYRIE-THE_VALKYRIE.cardsModifierDe: Valkyrie cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
THEVALKYRIE-THE_VALKYRIE.description:
A freshfaced Spireborn dreaming of a better life.
Impenetrable armor meets recklessness.
THEVALKYRIE-THE_VALKYRIE.eventDeathPreve: I can still fight! I WILL fight!
THEVALKYRIE-THE_VALKYRIE.goldMonologue: Oh, what feast I could buy with that!
THEVALKYRIE-THE_VALKYRIE.title: The Valkyrie
